fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: From Humbalytics -> Settings -> API Keys. Used for read-only analytics queries and experiment control.

fields.label: Property ID
fields.helpText: The property identifier for the site you are tracking. Find it in Humbalytics -> Property Settings.

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.helpText: Defaults to the Humbalytics cloud endpoint. Override only for self-hosted or staging deployments.

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key and property access via the property metadata endpoint

metadata.summary: Humbalytics web analytics with built-in A/B experimentation, traffic attribution, heat maps, and scroll-depth tracking. Runs experiments that dynamically rewrite page content without redeploying code.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Sign up at humbalytics.com and add your site as a property
2. Install the Humbalytics JavaScript snippet on your site (required for experiments + heatmaps)
3. Go to Settings -> API Keys and create a new key with read + experiments scopes
4. Copy the API key (hb_...) and your property ID (prop_...)
5. Paste them here

Note: dynamic content rewriting for A/B experiments requires the JS snippet to be active on the target pages -- the API alone does not modify the site.
